name: Tortilla Roll Ups
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch salad dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese with the remaining ingredients, except for the tortillas.
2. Spread the cheese mixture evenly on each tortilla.
3. Roll up the tortillas in a jelly roll style.
4. Slice into 1-inch pieces.
5. Secure with toothpicks.
